Results
bug
updateFragment(key, content) [Done]
Description
Updates a fragment or creates it if it doesn't exist.
Examples
Update from string. [0010-from-string]
HTML
<bitty-8-0 data-connect="Class5A45F"></bitty-8-0>
<div class="test" data-receive="test_signal_5A45F">bug</div>
JavaScript
<script>
window.Class5A45F = class {
  #key = "fragment_signal_5A45F";

  test_signal_5A45F(_, el) {
    this.updateFragment(this.#key, `<div>x</div><div>ok</div>`);
    el.innerHTML = this.renderFragment(this.#key).children[1].innerHTML;
  }

  /////////////////////////////////////////////////
  // Test Setup
  /////////////////////////////////////////////////

  bittyReady() {
    this.trigger("given_signal_5A45F");
  }

  given_signal_5A45F(_, __) {
    this.trigger("test_signal_5A45F");
  }
};
</script>
Results
bug
Log and provide success result. [0020-ok-true-on-success]
HTML
<bitty-8-0 data-connect="ClassFAB09"></bitty-8-0>
<div class="test" data-receive="test_signal_FAB09">bug</div>
JavaScript
<script>
window.ClassFAB09 = class {
  #key = "fragment_signal_FAB09";

  test_signal_FAB09(_, el) {
    const result = this.updateFragment(this.#key, `<div>x</div><div>ok</div>`);
    if (result.ok === true && result.level === "info") {
      el.innerHTML = "ok";
    }
  }

  /////////////////////////////////////////////////
  // Test Setup
  /////////////////////////////////////////////////

  bittyReady() {
    this.trigger("given_signal_FAB09");
  }

  given_signal_FAB09(_, __) {
    this.trigger("test_signal_FAB09");
  }
};
</script>
Results
bug
Error on fail [0030-ok-false-on-failure]
HTML
<bitty-8-0 data-connect="ClassC09FC"></bitty-8-0>
<div class="test" data-receive="test_signal_C09FC">bug</div>
JavaScript
<script>
window.ClassC09FC = class {
  #key = "fragment_signal_C09FC";

  test_signal_C09FC(_, el) {
    const result = this.updateFragment(this.#key, {
      key: "not a string, element, or document fragment",
    });
    if (result.ok === false && result.level === "error") {
      el.innerHTML = "ok";
    }
  }

  /////////////////////////////////////////////////
  // Test Setup
  /////////////////////////////////////////////////

  bittyReady() {
    this.trigger("given_signal_C09FC");
  }

  given_signal_C09FC(_, __) {
    this.setLogLevel("none");
    this.trigger("test_signal_C09FC");
  }
};
</script>
Results
bug
From fragment. [0040-from-fragment]
HTML
<bitty-8-0 data-connect="ClassE5126"></bitty-8-0>
<div class="test" data-receive="test_signal_E5126">bug</div>
JavaScript
<script>
window.ClassE5126 = class {
  #key = "fragment_signal_E5126";

  test_signal_E5126(fragment, el) {
    this.updateFragment(this.#key, fragment);
    el.innerHTML = this.renderFragment(this.#key).firstChild.innerHTML;
  }

  /////////////////////////////////////////////////
  // Test Setup
  /////////////////////////////////////////////////

  bittyReady() {
    this.trigger("given_signal_E5126");
  }

  given_signal_E5126(_, __) {
    const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();
    const element = document.createElement("div");
    element.innerHTML = "ok";
    fragment.appendChild(element);
    this.send(fragment, "test_signal_E5126");
  }
};
</script>
Results
bug
From element. [0050-from-element]
HTML
<bitty-8-0 data-connect="ClassB50E1"></bitty-8-0>
<div class="test" data-receive="test_signal_B50E1">bug</div>
JavaScript
<script>
window.ClassB50E1 = class {
  #key = "fragment_signal_B50E1";

  test_signal_B50E1(element, el) {
    this.updateFragment(this.#key, element);
    el.innerHTML = this.renderFragment(this.#key).firstChild.innerHTML;
  }

  /////////////////////////////////////////////////
  // Test Setup
  /////////////////////////////////////////////////

  bittyReady() {
    this.trigger("given_signal_B50E1");
  }

  given_signal_B50E1(_, __) {
    const element = document.createElement("div");
    element.innerHTML = "ok";
    this.send(element, "test_signal_B50E1");
  }
};
</script>
Results
bug
Store automatically. [0060-store-automatically]
HTML
<bitty-8-0 data-connect="Class3BC5E"></bitty-8-0>
<div class="test" data-receive="test_signal_3BC5E">bug</div>
JavaScript
<script>
window.Class3BC5E = class {
  #key = "fragment_signal_3BC5E";

  test_signal_3BC5E(element, el) {
    const result = this.loadFragment(this.#key);
    el.innerHTML = this.renderFragment(this.#key).firstChild.innerHTML;
  }

  /////////////////////////////////////////////////
  // Test Setup
  /////////////////////////////////////////////////

  bittyReady() {
    this.trigger("given_signal_3BC5E");
  }

  given_signal_3BC5E(_, __) {
    this.removeFragment(this.#key);
    this.updateFragment(this.#key, `<div>ok</div>`);
    delete this._fragment[this.#key];
    this.trigger("test_signal_3BC5E");
  }
};
</script>
Results

Don't warn if overwriting existing key. [0070-warn-on-overwrite]
HTML
<bitty-8-0 data-connect="ClassCA48A"></bitty-8-0>
<div class="test" data-receive="test_signal_CA48A">bug</div>
JavaScript
<script>
window.ClassCA48A = class {
  #key = "fragment_signal_CA48A";

  test_signal_CA48A(_, el) {
    const result = this.updateFragment(this.#key, `<div></div>`);
    if (result.ok === true && result.level === "info") {
      el.innerHTML = "ok";
    }
  }

  /////////////////////////////////////////////////
  // Test Setup
  /////////////////////////////////////////////////

  bittyReady() {
    this.trigger("given_signal_CA48A");
  }

  given_signal_CA48A(_, __) {
    this.setLogLevel("none");
    this.createFragment(this.#key, `<div></div>`);
    this.trigger("test_signal_CA48A");
  }
};
</script>
